---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the use case or pain point.

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
